SQLLite.SQL: SELECT ce.crt_code AS "CourtCode" FROM case_events ce, ae_events ae, wp_output wp WHERE wp.output_id = ${param.outputId} AND ae.ae_event_seq = wp.ae_event_seq AND ce.event_seq = ae.case_event_seq

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
